result.summary: The page is mostly intact, but there are a few visual defects: the 'SCROLL DOWN' control overlaps and obscures the legal terms text, the fine print is nearly unreadable due to size and contrast, and the 'Sports' item in the bottom navigation bar is missing its icon while all other items have one.

issues.description: The white 'SCROLL DOWN' pill/button is overlaid directly on top of the legal terms and conditions paragraph, cutting through and hiding several lines of the disclosure text.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator below the legal copy or add spacing/margin so it does not overlap the terms text, since promotional T&C disclosures may be legally required to be fully visible.

issues.description: In the bottom navigation bar, the 'SPORTS' item has no icon while all other items (Casino, Live Casino, Poker, Promos, Support) display icons, making the row look broken and misaligned.
issues.suggestion: Add the missing sports icon asset (or fix the broken image reference) so the 'SPORTS' nav item matches the visual style and vertical alignment of the other tabs.

issues.description: The legal fine print at the bottom uses very small dark-blue text on a bright yellow/gradient background, with parts fading into the background, resulting in poor readability and contrast.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size slightly and place the legal text on a solid, consistent background with sufficient contrast (WCAG AA 4.5:1).

issues.description: The 'SPORTS' label in the bottom nav sits higher than the other labels (which align under their icons), creating uneven vertical alignment across the navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Ensure all nav items share the same icon+label layout structure so labels align on a common baseline.
